/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AssetManager.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libAssetManager.so -o ../../libAssetManager.so CMakeFiles/AssetManager.dir/AssetManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetManager.dir/GarbageCollector.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/Engine/Engine/build ../../libDiagnostics.so ../../libLogger.so ../../libBasics.so ../../libSDL3.so.0.3.7
